entities.name: GENDER INEQUALITY
entities.description: The disparity between genders within a seed value chain that impedes service delivery and social upliftment

entities.name: SEED VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: The series of activities involved in the production and distribution of seeds

entities.name: SERVICE DELIVERY
entities.description: The provision of services within the seed value chain

entities.name: ECONOMIC AND SOCIAL UPLIFTMENT
entities.description: The improvement of financial and social status of rural communities

entities.name: RURAL COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Populations living in non-urban areas affected by seed value chain dynamics

entities.name: GENDER INTEGRATION
entities.description: The process of incorporating gender-responsive strategies into seed company operations

entities.name: LEGUME
entities.description: A group of plants including beans, peas, and lentils, specifically in the context of seed value chains in Tanzania

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: The country where the legume seed value chains and seed companies are located

entities.name: SEED COMPANIES
entities.description: Businesses involved in the production and sale of seeds

entities.name: GENDER-RESPONSIVE ACTIONS
entities.description: Specific steps and strategies adapted by companies to enhance gender integration and efficiency
